headline: PACCAR Recognizes Top Performing Suppliers in North America
summary: BELLEVUE, Wash., March 23, 2026--PACCAR uses its comprehensive Supplier Performance Management Program (SPM) to evaluate supplier achievements in the areas of product development, operations, aftermarket support and alignment with PACCAR’s key business objectives.

headline: Shares of machine-related companies are trading higher. The industry may be experiencing strength in response to a drop in the price of oil.
